title: Department of Sports Management - Student Opinions
content:
Department of Sports Management - Student Opinions

"Hello, I'm Can Yucel. I am the BESYO Sports Management 3rd grade representative of our school. I can say the following about our school; Our teachers are very good. Let our lecturers tell the subject, their diction and presentation are excellent. As students, we are pleased with the financial and moral support given to the students by our school. For example, not every school allocates a grant loan for Erasmus, but our school has its own budget. Former graduate students are also of this opinion. Especially before my first enrollment in our school, I talked to former graduates and made my enrollment accordingly. He is often active in our Clubs within the School. We are very pleased with the newly appointed BESYO Management, they do all kinds of operations both for our sports facilities, for the supply of sports equipment, and for the recruitment of teachers suitable for the field. They are preparing a joint team with Sks. They allow us to participate in intercollegiate tournaments. Since our teachers in the field have expertise in different sports branches as coaching, they provide us with a high level of education."

Can Yucel

This content was updated on 30/01/2026.
